headline: Illinois Tool Works Delivers 63rd Straight Dividend Hike, Nearly Tripling Payouts Since 2016
summary: Illinois Tool Works (NYSE: ITW) delivered its latest quarterly dividend of $1.61 per share on April 9, 2026, continuing a streak that few industrial companies can match. With 63 consecutive years of dividend increases, ITW sits firmly in the Dividend King tier, a distinction earned through decades of disciplined capital allocation and margin expansion. Here ... Illinois Tool Works Delivers 63rd Straight Dividend Hike, Nearly Tripling Payouts Since 2016
